title: senecio polytomus subsp. squarrosus
intro: Senecio polytomus subsp. squarrosus, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio polytomus subsp. squarrosus include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing swelling and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it's essential to use it under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
